prompt:
Goal: Create a luxurious Chinese real-estate grand-opening poster for 云栖东方, with a premium Oriental mansion aesthetic, deep auspicious red background, metallic gold typography, and a photorealistic mansion entrance as the hero image.

Canvas: Vertical poster, 9:16 ratio, high-resolution commercial advertising design. Use a strong symmetrical composition with generous red negative space in the upper half and architectural realism in the lower middle.

Layout: Top left has a small circular gold emblem logo above the project name and small English subtitle “ORIENTAL MANSIONS.” Top right has a refined small slogan and English subtitle. Center upper area contains the main oversized gold brush-calligraphy headline 东方院落 大境初开, arranged vertically in two columns with a tiny vertical English label “ORIENTAL MANSION” between the columns. Beneath the headline, add a smaller gold line reading 首期开盘 恭迎品鉴. Middle section shows a grand symmetrical Chinese-style mansion gate: cream stone walls, gold metal screens, warm lighting, wide steps, reflecting pools on both sides, manicured pine trees, blossoming white trees, and modern residential buildings receding behind the walls. Add a red lower information panel separated by a thin gold line and a centered gold seal ornament.

Text content: In the lower panel, place the large date 5月18日 followed by the smaller phrase “first phase opening” in Chinese style, then a product line with 168–220㎡ 臻席叠墅 恭迎品鉴. Below that, include exactly 5 feature items in a row, each with a small circular gold line icon and two lines of refined text: 1) Oriental courtyard style, 2) Waterfront prosperity, 3) Ceremonial gate system, 4) Low-density pure villa living, 5) Fine craftsmanship. At the bottom, include VIP line 021-8888 8888, a project address line, developer line, and very tiny legal disclaimer text.

Visual style: Ultra-premium Chinese luxury property poster, red and gold palette, elegant serif typography mixed with expressive gold foil brush calligraphy, realistic architectural rendering, warm golden lighting, crisp details, glossy reflections in water, balanced symmetry, high-end brochure quality.

Constraints: Use exactly 5 feature icons in the bottom row. Keep the mansion entrance centered and symmetrical. Do not add people, cars, QR codes, or extra decorative clutter. Avoid modern neon colors; keep everything ceremonial, refined, and affluent.

Goal: Create a luxurious Chinese real-estate grand-opening poster for 云栖东方, with a premium Oriental mansion aesthetic, deep auspicious red background, metallic gold typography, and a photorealistic mansion entrance as the hero image.

Canvas: Vertical poster, 9:16 ratio, high-resolution commercial advertising design. Use a strong symmetrical composition with generous red negative space in the upper half and architectural realism in the lower middle.

Center upper area contains the main oversized gold brush-calligraphy headline 东方院落 大境初开, arranged vertically in two columns with a tiny vertical English label “ORIENTAL MANSION” between the columns. At the bottom, include VIP line 021-8888 8888, a project address line, developer line, and very tiny legal disclaimer text.

promptZh:
目标：为 云栖东方 创建一张高端中式房地产开盘海报，采用奢华的东方府邸美学，以深邃的吉祥红为背景，搭配金属质感金色字体，并以写实风格的府邸入口作为主视觉。

画布：竖版海报，9:16 比例，高分辨率商业广告设计。采用强对称构图，上半部分留出充裕的红色负空间，下半部分展示写实的建筑景观。

布局：左上角放置一个小巧的圆形金色徽标，下方为项目名称及小型英文副标题“ORIENTAL MANSIONS”。右上角放置精致的短标语及英文副标题。中心上方区域为醒目的超大金色书法标题 东方院落 大境初开，以两列竖排方式排列，两列之间加入微小的竖排英文标签“ORIENTAL MANSION”。标题下方添加一行较小的金色文字 首期开盘 恭迎品鉴。中部展示宏伟对称的中式府邸大门：米色石墙、金色金属格栅、暖色灯光、宽阔台阶，两侧设有倒影池，点缀修剪整齐的松树和盛开的白花树，背景隐约可见现代住宅楼。底部添加一个由细金线分隔的红色信息栏，并配以居中的金色印章装饰。

文字内容：在底部面板中，放置大号日期 5月18日，随后是中式风格的“首期开盘”小字，接着是产品信息行 168–220㎡ 臻席叠墅 恭迎品鉴。下方并排包含 5 个特色项目，每个项目配有一个小型圆形金线图标和两行精致文字：1) 东方院落风格，2) 滨水聚财，3) 礼序门第，4) 低密纯墅生活，5) 精工匠造。最底部包含 VIP 专线 021-8888 8888、项目地址行、开发商信息行以及极小的法律免责声明。

视觉风格：超高端中式豪宅海报，红金配色，优雅的衬线字体与富有表现力的烫金书法相结合，写实建筑渲染，温暖的金色光影，细节清晰，水面光泽倒影，平衡对称，具备高端宣传册品质。

约束条件：底部一行必须包含 5 个特色图标。保持府邸入口居中且对称。不要添加人物、车辆、二维码或多余的装饰性杂物。避免使用现代霓虹色；保持整体风格庄重、典雅且富有底蕴。
